title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 167.251 - Board to prescribe rules and regulations — driver to give bond — fund charged with transportation expenses
text:
167.251.  Board to prescribe rules and regulations — driver to give bond — fund charged with transportation expenses. — When transportation is provided by a district pursuant to law, the school board shall make all needful rules and regulations for the transportation of pupils and shall require from every person employed for that purpose, a reasonable bond conditioned upon the faithful discharge of his duties as prescribed by the board.  Expenses of transportation shall be paid out of the incidental fund of the district.
(L. 1963 p. 200 § 8-25) 
(Source: RSMo 1959 § 165.140)
